tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Almost all fail-to-pass tests (test_anchor_link_interface_has_targetOffset through test_getInternalCurrentAnchor_called_with_linkTargetOffset) use only regex pattern matching on source file contents (e.g., `re.search(pattern, content)`). None of these import or execute the code. The pass-to-pass tests do run commands (lint, tsc, jest), but the core feature tests are purely textual.

test_not_tautological.reason: Since tests only check for text patterns in source files, a stub implementation that simply contains the right text patterns/comments without actually implementing the logic would pass. For example, adding dead code with the exact regex-matched strings would satisfy tests like test_linkTargetOffsetRef_exists and test_handleScrollTo_uses_link_targetOffset without any functional implementation.

anti_cheating_measures.reason: The solution exists at /workspace/ant-design after the agent applies changes, and solution/solve.sh is in the container. The agent could read /solution/solve.sh or the test file itself (tests/test_outputs.py) to discover the exact regex patterns being checked and produce matching code without understanding the problem. The tests only do text matching, making pattern-copying trivial.
